videoSnippet.title: The DIVINE Line || Hikaru Nakamura vs Javokhir Sindarov || FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 R5

Nakamura, Hikaru (2810) - Sindarov, Javokhir (2745) 
FIDE Candidates Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [05] 2026.04.03
D31 Queen's Gambit Declined, semi-Slav, Marshall gambit

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nc3 c6 4.e4 dxe4 5.Nxe4 Bb4+ 6.Bd2 Qxd4 7.Bxb4 Qxe4+ 8.Be2 Na6 9.Bd6 Qxg2 10.Bf3 Qg5 11.Ne2 Ne7 12.Ng3 O-O 13.h4 Qa5+ 14.b4 Nxb4 15.O-O Re8 16.Qd2 c5 17.Rad1 Nf5 18.Nxf5 exf5 19.Qf4 Nc6 20.Kh1 Nd4 21.Rg1 g6 22.Bd5 Be6 23.Bxb7 Ne2 24.Qd2 Qxd2 25.Rxd2 Nxg1 26.Bxa8 Rxa8 27.Kxg1 Rd8 28.Bf4 Rxd2 29.Bxd2 Bxc4 30.Be3 Bxa2 31.Bxc5 a5 32.f4 f6 33.Kf2 Kf7 34.Ba3 Ke6 35.Bf8 a4 36.Ke3 Kf7 37.Bb4 h6 38.Kf2 g5 39.Kg3 Bd5 40.Ba3 Be4 41.Bc1 gxh4+
